claims.headline: Improves sleep quality
claims.notesSentence: Magnesium supplementation improved insomnia severity, sleep efficiency, and onset latency in older adults.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Magnesium sleep quality trial on PubMed

claims.headline: Eases stress & anxiety
claims.notesSentence: A systematic review concluded magnesium reduces subjective anxiety and stress in mild anxiety states.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Magnesium anxiety systematic review on PubMed
